sentences.arabic: شَاشَاتُ الْهَوَاتِفِ الذَّكِيَّةِ تُؤَثِّرُ عَلَى صِحَّةِ الْعَيْنِ.
sentences.translation: Ekrani pametnih telefona utječu na zdravlje očiju.

sentences.arabic: قَرَّرَ سَامِي تَقْلِيلَ سَاعَاتِ اسْتِخْدَامِ الْهَاتِفِ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Sami je odlučio smanjiti sate korištenja telefona svakog dana.
sentences.translationEn: Sami decided to reduce the hours of phone use every day.

sentences.arabic: هُوَ يَقْرَأُ الْكُتُبَ الْوَرَقِيَّةَ بَدَلًا مِنَ التَّصَفُّحِ الْمُسْتَمِرِّ.
sentences.translation: On čita papirne knjige umjesto neprestanog pretraživanja.
sentences.translationEn: He reads paper books instead of continuous browsing.
